parameters.name: BizName
parameters.description:
The business scenario for record acceleration, used as a filter condition for queries. Valid values:
- **image_video**: Image and Video.
- **api**: API.
- **web**: Web page.

parameters.name: Proxied
parameters.description:
Indicates whether proxy acceleration is enabled for the record, used as a filter condition for queries. Valid values:

- **true**: Enables proxy.
- **false**: Disables proxy acceleration.

parameters.name: RecordMatchType
parameters.description:
The search matching pattern for the record name. The default value is exact match. Valid values:  
- **prefix**: prefix match.  
- **suffix**: suffix match.  
- **exact**: exact match.  
- **fuzzy**: fuzzy match.

parameters.name: RecordName
parameters.description: The record name. This is used as a filter condition for the query.

parameters.name: SiteId
parameters.description: The site ID. You can obtain this by invoking the [ListSites](~~2850189~~) API.

parameters.name: SourceType
parameters.description:
The origin server type of the record, used as a filter condition for queries (only CNAME records can be filtered by this field). Valid values:
- **OSS**: OSS origin server.
- **S3**: S3 origin server.
- **LB**: Server Load Balancer origin server.
- **OP**: Address pool origin server.
- **Domain**: Standard domain name origin server.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: The DNS record type of the record, used as a filter condition for queries.
